steps.title: Convert the acceleration units
steps.content:
Convert meters to miles and seconds squared to minutes squared:
$$10.7\cdot\frac{1}{1{,}609}\cdot60^2$$

steps.title: Round the converted rate
steps.content:
This value is about $23.94$:
$$10.7\cdot\frac{3{,}600}{1{,}609}$$
Rounded to the nearest tenth, it is $23.9$ miles per minute squared. The answer is B.
